TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Uraw, title = Uraw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uraw} }

S.FORM: Uraw Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Uraw a niyaro', 43 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 181 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 171 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal91%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, roma2%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: o~u~uraw itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u o~u~uraw a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Uraw Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Uraw a niyaro', 43 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 181 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 171 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal91%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, roma2%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: o~u~uraw itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u o~u~uraw a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
